tasks.title: openrouter issue, plz help for fixed this issue.

openrouter issue, plz help for fixed this issue.

tasks.title: 請參照~/.qclaw/workspace/scripts/sync_howto.sh
tasks.description:
請參照~/.qclaw/workspace/scripts/sync_howto.sh
這個方式，將/Users/claw/Tasks/*也備份到https://github.com/openclawchen8-lgtm/openclaw-tasks
並新增/Users/claw/.qclaw/workspace/scripts/sync_tasks.sh
並加入排程
